Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs_per_bldg.comstock_building_type, ts_aggr.timestamp AS timestamp, sum(bs_per_bldg.tract_count) AS sample_count, sum(bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS units_count, sum(ts_aggr._inner_rows) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (ts_aggr.bldg_id, ts_aggr.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(ts_aggr.bs__elec_minus_gas * bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM (SELECT ts_flat.state AS state, ts_flat.timestamp AS timestamp, ts_flat.bldg_id AS bldg_id, sum(ts_flat._v__elec_minus_gas) AS bs__elec_minus_gas, count(*) AS _inner_rows FROM (SELECT comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AS state, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AS bldg_id, date_trunc('month', date_add('second', -900, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp)) AS timestamp, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" AS _v__elec_minus_gas FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade IN (1) AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) AS ts_flat GROUP BY ts_flat.state, ts_flat.timestamp, ts_flat.bldg_id) AS ts_aggr JOIN (SELECT bs.bldg_id AS bldg_id, bs.state AS state, bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(bs.weight) AS bldg_weight, count(*) AS tract_count FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.state, bs."in.comstock_building_type") AS bs_per_bldg ON bs_per_bldg.bldg_id = ts_aggr.bldg_id AND bs_per_bldg.state = ts_aggr.state GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/b8f1744b886274cd8f8044fe0cf9b24a1f8b66ea0a1c6b83a11929347ce4fffa/a262efdb-1df5-445f-8e41-65e0ee8917a8/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
